For complete classification of this subtitle to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 97–3595 Stat. 643section 1101 of this titleAug. 13, 1981

children.text: the removal by a date certain of the Federal Government’s obligation to subsidize the freight operations of Conrail;
transfer of Conrail commuter service responsibilities to one or more entities whose principal purpose is the provision of commuter service; and
an orderly return of Conrail freight service to the private sector.
